creator: itinerant@mac.com
text:
It seems that neither py24-gnome-extras nor py24-gnome-desktop packages
install the gnomeapplet python module. Consequently deskbar-applet fails
to compile, causing the build of gnome2 to fail.

This is with recent 13 Aug ports tree.

How-To-Repeat: make install in /usr/ports/x11/gnome2
